g.text: Latency Histogram Bucket Structure | Memory Layout
Heap: HistogramBucket Array | 16 bytes per element

g.title: The maximum latency value (exclusive) for this bucket.

ol.li:
For each Bucket B:
If latency < B.upper_bound:
B.count++ (Cumulative update)

g.text: Where L,U are bucket bounds and C is cumulative count.
Concurrency: Atomic updates required for counts

g.title: The maximum latency value (exclusive) for this bucket.
